docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SAMPAIO, ANDERSON LYFT, INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JEANNIE LIEU, PARALEGAL. FILED BY DEFENDANT LYFT, INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE WAIVED) SERVED DEC-29-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-07-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF ANDERSON SAMPAIO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JEANNIE LIEU, PARALEGAL. COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT LYFT, INC TO PROVIDE NAME & CONTACT INFORMATION OF CLAIMER (RIDER) BY 2-21-23 (WITHIN 2 WEEKS). JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED BY THE COURT AFTER 2-21-23. DEPT 506 EMAIL ADDRESS HAS BEEN GIVEN TO MS. LIEU BY THE COURTROOM CLERK IN COURT FOR SENDING THE INFORMATION. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMPAIO, ANDERSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYFT, INC $239.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $239.40, WITH A DEGREE OF RELUCTANCE, THE COURT FINDS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT. THE EVIDENCE SHOWED THAT PLAINTIFF WAS A LONG-TIME DRIVER WITH GOOD RECORD. THE COURT IS NOT CONVINCED THAT PLAINTIFF MADE THE STATEMENT THAT WAS THE BASIS FOR DEFENDANT'S DECISION TO TERMINATE THE USER AGREEMENT AND DEFENDANT'S DECISION APPEARS TO BE BASED ON LESS THAN A THOROUGH INVESTIGATION. THAT SAID AND UNFORTUNATELY FOR PLAINTIFF... (EXCEEDING TEXT ENTRY ALLOWED BY COURTROOM CLERK. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR EXPANDED TEXT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMPAIO, ANDERSON
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF SAMPAIO, ANDERSON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-07-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SAMPAIO, ANDERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LYFT, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
